analysis: This week has 122 tasks due across 10 projects, with 52 tasks already overdue from previous weeks. That's a combined load of 174 items the team needs to manage.
🌧️ **Weather note:** 5 days with possible rain. Not a full stop but PMs should monitor conditions, especially for the 42 outdoor tasks due this week.
⛔ **1 task is blocked** by overdue dependencies. These can't move until their prerequisites are done. The PMs responsible should treat those blockers as their #1 priority this week.

💰 **Payment chain alert:** 29 payments across all projects are effectively blocked because the work that needs to happen before them is overdue. Even though the payment dates look fine in the schedule, these payments CANNOT happen until the prerequisite work is done.
Of those, 3 are **client income payments** ($36,751). This is money that won't come in until the blocking work is cleared.
26 are **sub/material payments** ($38,693) — the work isn't done so these shouldn't be paid yet either.
🚨 **Income at risk:** 3 client payments ($36,751) are blocked by overdue work. Do NOT delay the tasks that lead to these payments — they're your path to cash.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition** has the heaviest load: 21 tasks due. With 9 already overdue, the PM needs to ruthlessly prioritize.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)** has the heaviest load: 20 tasks due. With 13 already overdue, the PM needs to ruthlessly prioritize.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)** has the heaviest load: 19 tasks due. With 9 already overdue, the PM needs to ruthlessly prioritize.
